description: You have a Maven Java project called 'music-catalog' open in IntelliJ IDEA. The project models a digital music store based on the Chinook schema. Complete the implementation of the six classes in com.musiccatalog.impl (Track, Album, Artist, Playlist, Podcast, and Genre) by implementing all methods required by the Playable, Catalogable, and Searchable interfaces according to their Javadoc and TODO comments. For each class, provide a constructor initializing all fields (excluding 'playing' state), and implement equals(), hashCode(), and toString() methods. The task is complete when all compilation errors are resolved and all 18 JUnit tests in src/test/java pass.
